name: small metal room
description: I'm in a small metal room
hints: Another small metal room in the alien complex, beyond the force field.
This is part of the inner alien sanctum. Search for controls or hidden items.
These rooms contain the alien technology needed for the endgame of Savage Island.
No standard exits. Part of the force field complex accessed from room 29-30 area.
notes: Small metal room in alien inner sanctum. No standard exits. Part of endgame force field complex.
